rationale: In the citing paper, Achar et al. (2020) appears mainly as part of grouped background citations on health message framing, not as a paper that drives the focal theory. The core hypotheses and studies in the citing paper center on moral identity, risk-factor stigma, defensive processing, and self-affirmation, without using the cited paper's construal-level mechanism, behavior taxonomy, or design as a direct basis. A later mention in the discussion (detection vs. prevention as a possible moderator) is forward-looking and peripheral rather than foundational to the reported model.
